decisions.decision: Browser-CLI parity structurally guaranteed by single Rust source
decisions.rationale: Both consume identical core/src/ code via different build targets (wasm vs native cli). No TS calculation path remains to diverge. Float32 decode offsets verified against Rust emitter.
